title: Forager
body:
Forager is a 16x Resourcepack that aims to soften and saturate the world of Minecraft while enhancing details through extra 3D models and varied textures.

For Versions 1.19 - 1.21.10, Vanilla & Modded compatible
Check out the Add-ons page for extra packs!

Features

- Custom mob models - 3D foliage and blocks: from mushrooms to iron bars to ladders - Varied textures: randomized grass textures and heights - Fixes and changes to incorrect resolutions and errors

Mods Required for full features

- OptiFine or EMF&ETF for custom entity/mob models (Pack will NOT work without ETF when using EMF)

Terms

Feel free to: - Add to servers - Modify content for personal use - Share with proper credit

Please do not:

- Reupload or sell - Modify or copy designs and/or claim ownership - Share without credit
If you are unsure, please ask permission in a DM

If you want to get the latest updates or access to newest versions first, check out my Patreon or Kofi!
